mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m') AS month_label, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_requests, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate FROM repair_requests WHERE submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL #{recentMonths} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month_label DESC
